repos.name: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
repos.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary
repos.descriptionZh: AI 代理技能可研究 Reddit、X、YouTube、HN、Polymarket 和网络上的任何主题，然后综合得出有根据的摘要

repos.name: apple/container
repos.description: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.
repos.descriptionZh: 一种在 Mac 上使用轻量级虚拟机创建和运行 Linux 容器的工具。它是用 Swift 编写的，并针对 Apple 芯片进行了优化。

repos.name: phuryn/pm-skills
repos.description: PM Skills Marketplace: 100+ agentic skills, commands, and plugins — from discovery to strategy, execution, launch, and growth.
repos.descriptionZh: PM 技能市场：100 多种代理技能、命令和插件 - 从发现到策略、执行、启动和增长。

repos.name: chopratejas/headroom
repos.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.
repos.descriptionZh: 在工具输出、日志、文件和 RAG 块到达 LLM 之前对其进行压缩。减少 60-95% 的标记，答案相同。库、代理、MCP 服务器。

repos.name: NVIDIA/SkillSpector
repos.description: Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks.
repos.descriptionZh: AI 代理技能的安全扫描器。检测漏洞、恶意模式和安全风险。

repos.name: addyosmani/agent-skills
repos.description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.
repos.descriptionZh: AI 编码代理的生产级工程技能。

repos.name: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
repos.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
repos.descriptionZh: 让您的人工智能代理有一双能够看到整个互联网的眼睛。阅读和搜索 Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小红书 — 一个 CLI，零 API 费用。

repos.name: refactoringhq/tolaria
repos.description: Desktop app to manage markdown knowledge bases
repos.descriptionZh: 用于管理 Markdown 知识库的桌面应用程序

repos.name: Leonxlnx/taste-skill
repos.description: Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop
repos.descriptionZh: 品味技能 - 给你的人工智能良好的品味。阻止人工智能产生无聊的、通用的斜坡

repos.name: microsoft/markitdown
repos.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.
repos.descriptionZh: 用于将文件和 Office 文档转换为 Markdown 的 Python 工具。

repos.name: aaif-goose/goose
repos.description: an open source, extensible AI agent that goes beyond code suggestions - install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM
repos.descriptionZh: 开源、可扩展的 AI 代理，超越代码建议 - 使用任何 LLM 安装、执行、编辑和测试

repos.name: roboflow/supervision
repos.description: We write your reusable computer vision tools. 💜
repos.descriptionZh: 我们为您编写可重复使用的计算机视觉工具。 💜

repos.name: music-assistant/server
repos.description: Music Assistant is a free, opensource Media library manager that connects to your streaming services and a wide range of connected speakers. The server is the beating heart, the core of Music Assistant and must run on an always-on device like a Raspberry Pi, a NAS or an Intel NUC or alike.
repos.descriptionZh: 音乐助手是一款免费的开源媒体库管理器，可连接到您的流媒体服务和各种连接的扬声器。服务器是跳动的心脏，是音乐助手的核心，必须在始终在线的设备上运行，例如 Raspberry Pi、NAS 或 Intel NUC 等。

repos.name: microsoft/PowerToys
repos.description: Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows
repos.descriptionZh: Microsoft PowerToys 是一系列实用程序，可提高 Windows 上的工作效率和自定义功能

repos.name: mattermost/mattermost
repos.description: Mattermost is an open source platform for secure collaboration across the entire software development lifecycle..
repos.descriptionZh: Mattermost 是一个开源平台，用于在整个软件开发生命周期中进行安全协作。

repos.name: lfnovo/open-notebook
repos.description: An Open Source implementation of Notebook LM with more flexibility and features
repos.descriptionZh: Notebook LM 的开源实现，具有更多灵活性和功能

repos.name: huggingface/OpenEnv
repos.description: An interface library for RL post training with environments.
repos.descriptionZh: 用于环境强化学习后期训练的接口库。
